keywords.title: Keywords
keywords.description: Search keywords (Chinese, Korean, English all supported). Each keyword runs a separate search.
keywords.sectionDescription: Enter keywords and configure search filters. Douyin search is most accurate with Chinese keywords.

keyword.title: Single keyword (fallback)
keyword.description: Used only when 'keywords' list is empty.

maxItems.title: Max results
maxItems.description: Maximum number of videos to return per keyword. Start with 50 for exploration.

searchSource.title: Search type
searchSource.description: general = combined search (recommended), video = video-only, user = creators only.

sortType.title: Sort by
sortType.description: RELEVANCE = best match, MOST_LIKED = most likes, LATEST = newest first.

region.title: Region
region.description: Region hint. Douyin is mainland-China-only — most users keep CN.

minPlayCount.title: Min views
minPlayCount.description: Exclude videos with fewer views than this. NOTE: Douyin hides public play counts (returns 0/null in most cases) — this filter has limited effect.

strictKeywordMatch.title: Strict keyword match
strictKeywordMatch.description: Filter out videos where the keyword does not appear in title, description, hashtags, or author name. OFF by default — all results are returned with keywordRelevance field.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy
proxyConfiguration.description: Apify Proxy configuration. Douyin works best with mainland-China residential IPs — Apify RESIDENTIAL has limited CN coverage. Consider 'Custom proxy URLs' with a CN provider for production use.
proxyConfiguration.sectionDescription: These settings work well with defaults. Change only if needed.

mirrorVideos.title: Stable video previews
mirrorVideos.description: Provide a stable preview URL that stays playable in Console after Douyin's original URL expires.

mirrorVideoBytes.title: Preview clip size (bytes)
mirrorVideoBytes.description: Bytes per preview clip. Default 262144 = 256 KB.

minDurationSec.title: Min video duration
minDurationSec.description: Exclude videos shorter than this many seconds. 0 = no filter.

maxConcurrentKeywords.title: Parallel keywords
maxConcurrentKeywords.description: Number of keywords to search in parallel. Higher = faster but memory scales linearly. Recommended: 1-4 at 2 GB memory.

useProxy.title: Use residential proxy
useProxy.description: Use Apify RESIDENTIAL proxy. Disable only when running with custom CN proxy URLs.

includeSearchKeywords.title: Include search keyword in results
includeSearchKeywords.description: Add searchKeyword field to each result item.

msToken.title: msToken (optional)
msToken.description: Douyin auth token. Leave empty — the Actor handles this automatically.
